      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIII. Dseesma.
weena Pateikschanaß. Dseesma/ eekſch la wee:
a Kristita Zilweka Sir̃ds Deewu flawe un
ateiz ka tas wiſſnu mahza un uſturruſib
enu Zetty : 2 Eepreezina un glabbi eekſch
iſſahm Beb:dahm zaurfawu Wahrdu : 3/4.
rett wiſſeem Eenaidnekeem pahrſtahw : 5.
Weena Dahwida Dseesma.
As KUNGS irr mans
Gans/ man ne truhks
ueneeka.
* Wiſſch leeſ manu us faḥ-
ahm Gannibahm gannitees/
sch wadda manni pee paleh-
ilhdent.
Eebr. Wall: Wiſſch darra man gullim-
Lohpi pee-ehduschi Sahlê nogull.
• Wiſſch atſpirḍsina man-
Dwehfeli/ wiſſch wedd man
tahs Taifnibas Zelkerin tawa
hrda labbad.
• Jevichn es arri Nahwes
as Eleiſjâ staigatu/ tad es
nuna ne bihſtohs/ jo tu effi
mannis/ taug Kobks un
s Sists mannis eepreezina.
• Tu kataifi manna Preek
weenu Baldu prett manneem
idneefeem/ tu fwaidi mannu
wu ar Etji/ mans Biktcris
avislam peeleeſs.
• Teſcham/ Labbums un
ehlaſtiba ces man pakkat
à manna Minhscha/ un es
chu ta KUNGA Namuná
umebr.
Ta XXIV. Dseesma.
eena Papreekschluddinaſchana no Kri-
Waltiibas/ kas wiſſa Pajanlè tapß fa-
a: 1. etc. Pamahza wiſſus Waldita."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weena Dahwida Dseesma.
1. A Semme peederr tam
KUNGAſ/ ar fawu 2
Pilnibu/ tahs Semmes
Wirfus/ un kas us to dfihwo.
2. Jo wiſſch irr to pee Juhr-
ru dibbinajs/ un pee Uppehn to
ſtiprinajs.
3. Kas rahps us ta KUN-
GA Kalnu? un kas stahwehs D
winna swehta Weeta?
4. Rain nenoseedsigas Roh-
kas/ un fchkihſta Sir̃ds irraid/
kas ar fawu Dwehfeli Neleetibu
ne Dsenn/ un ar Wiltu ne lahd.
5. Tas dabbuhs to Sweh-
tumu no ta KUNGA/ un Taif-
nibu no fawas Pestifschanas
Deewa.
6. Schi irr ta Zilte/ kas pehz
winnu waiza/ kas tawu Waigu
mekle (eekſch) Jehkaba/ Sela.
7. Juhs Wahrtis pazelleet
fawus Palodus/ un tehpect pa-
angſtinatas juhs Pafanteß Dur-
wis/ jo tas Gehdibas Rehninsch
nahks.
8. Kas tas tahds Rehninsch
tabs Gehdibas? tas KUNGS
niprajs un warrenajs / tas
KUNGS warrenajs Karta.
9. Juhs Wahrtis pazelleet
tawus Palodus/ un pa-augſti-
najeetees juhs muhſchigas Dur-
wis/ jo tas Gehdibas Rehninsch
nahks.
10. Kas tas tahds Rehninsch
tahs Gehdibas? tas KUNGS
Zebo-"
    }
